title: What is the Lowest IQ Mob in Minecraft?

scenes.clipper_notes: Show my character walking towards the camera in a chess studio world, behind them are the animals which will be used for scene #2. basically, have a bunch of mobs in a row like they're being considered for dumbest mob
Camera focused on the mobs this time not my player walking
Show TrackEntity of my character swimming in a warm ocean biome

scenes.script_line: based on the number of actions that a mob can make
scenes.clipper_notes: Show a pig doing a bunch of different actions: 4a, 4b, 4c, 4d. First, show a pig doing the eat grass animation, then show them running / panicking after being hit, then show my player riding a pig with saddle and carrot on stick, and finally the pig mating

scenes.script_line: then the villager would definitely be the smartest
scenes.clipper_notes: Will have 5a and 5b. First, show a villager standing in a studio world, then in the second clip, villager is in same spot with same camera position but now there's a bunch of bookshelves behind the villager and the villager is now a librarian type villager
Show my player walking talking to the camera infront of the scene from 5
Show villagers gossiping (talking to each other) at the bell
Show the first person trade menu with a villager
Show a villager standing next to their workstation (not a farmer villager)
Show a farmer villager farming
Show close up on a villager's face

scenes.script_line: The dumbest mob would be one
scenes.clipper_notes: Show, you morphed as a pig, looking at blocks spelling 2+2 in a studio world, like the pig is struggling with 2+2

scenes.script_line: which has the least amount of goals
scenes.clipper_notes: Show TrackEntity of a nitwit villager (the type thats green and can't get a job) walking around doing something that isn't working
Show my player ice boat traveling in one of those winter biomes with all ice, going through a hoop, like they're going through a goal
Show bird's eye view from high up, timelapse of my player walking across the frame
Show close up on my player as they eat something

scenes.script_line: But this is kind of tricky
scenes.clipper_notes: Show my player looking at the camera infront of the 2+2 built in blocks

scenes.script_line: because some mobs that you think would be dumb
scenes.clipper_notes: Will have 18a, 18b, 18c, 18d, 18e. Basically in a studio world, we'll have the camera in same spot, the mobs in same spot just replacing the mobs, showing some mobs people think might be dumb: Sniffer, Pig, Chicken, Llama, Slime
Show yourself morphed as a sniffer looking at some bookshelves as if they're reading books, like its revealed they're actually smart
Show a bunny falling in from a few blocks up like they're spawning in

scenes.script_line: You'd think it just hops around
scenes.clipper_notes: Show a bunny hopping around
Show a (snow) bunny inside a snow igloo

scenes.script_line: but it also flees from wolves
scenes.clipper_notes: Show bunny fleeing from a wolf
Show a bunny running away from my character
Show bunny eating a planted ripe carrot crop
Show killer bunny variant attacking my player

scenes.script_line: if its the killer bunny variant
scenes.clipper_notes: Show killer bunny variant standing still in a studio world
Show a fox standing on a gold pedestal in a chess studio world
Show a villager on a diamond pedestal

scenes.script_line: because it has a total of 28 goals,
scenes.clipper_notes: Show timelapse, of a fox standing in a chess studio world, then the number 28 is built in blocks behind them, in an orange colored block

scenes.script_line: which is more than twice as many
scenes.clipper_notes: Show a fox which is twice the normal size running around in a world hunting bunnies
Show a scaled up fox standing next to an enderman in a chess world, like the fox is roughly twice the size of the enderman
Show my player looking at the camera infront of the scene from #33

scenes.script_line: those guys seem kind of smart.
scenes.clipper_notes: Show TrackEntity of an enderman running around holding a beacon
Have my player sprinting, but then export a shot of the time froze, like its 'still'
Show a notebox going off in a studio world with Bart Simpson character standing next to it

scenes.script_line: what the dumbest mob in the game is
scenes.clipper_notes: Show a gray concrete box in a studio world like the dumbest mob is in there we just don't know what it is yet
Show my player nodding at the camera while standing infront of the gray box
Show different angle of the gray box
Timelapse of the number 2 being built out of blocks over the gray box

scenes.script_line: half as many as the second lowest,
scenes.clipper_notes: Show timelapse of 4 being built in a studio world
Show my player 'moving randomly'
Show my player fleeing while on fire

scenes.script_line: take a second to try and guess it if you want:
scenes.clipper_notes: Show my player standing still looking at the camera while standing infront of the gray box again
The gray box is revealed to have the Squid in it
